trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in the "ErrImageNeverPull" status, meaning the image specified in the pod's container cannot be pulled.The describe output shows that the pod is unable to pull the image "misspeling-app:latset" due to a misspelling in the image name.I have fixed the issue by patching the deployment to use the correct image name "misspelling-app:latest" instead of the misspelled "misspeling-app:latset".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-qfk4f -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-qfk4f   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          13s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-qfk4f -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-qfk4f
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Mon, 15 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
